caption: A news broadcast features a scene with several men gathered outdoors. A man in a black vest, white shirt, and red cap stands centrally, speaking while surrounded by other men in light-colored shirts and police uniforms. To the left, a small inset window displays a close-up of a man with glasses. On the right, smaller inset photos of other men appear. The screen is filled with news graphics, including a red header with the text "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. A yellow "BREAKING NEWS" banner spans the bottom, and a digital clock shows "10:09 PM". As the sequence progresses, the on-screen text and inset photos on the right change; names like "डॉ. प्रेम कुमार" and "विजय चौधरी" are replaced by "राजेन्द्र यादव" and "नण कुमार". The central group of people remains in a similar position, continuing their interaction in an outdoor setting with foliage visible in the background.
